# Web_For_DGU

**AWS Cloud Clubs at DGU 공식 홈페이지**  
동국대학교 AWS Cloud Clubs(ACC DGU)의 활동과 정보를 제공하는 웹사이트입니다.

---

## 📌 Pages

- **Home**  
  기본 소개 제공.  
  ![Image](https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/106393694/476114067-702e9440-c7b2-478a-9de8-455c1bb6647c.png?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJnaXRodWIuY29tIiwiYXVkIjoicmF3LmdpdGh1YnVzZXJjb250ZW50LmNvbSIsImtleSI6ImtleTUiLCJleHAiOjE3NTQ2NzI1MjQsIm5iZiI6MTc1NDY3MjIyNCwicGF0aCI6Ii8xMDYzOTM2OTQvNDc2MTE0MDY3LTcwMmU5NDQwLWM3YjItNDc4YS05ZGU4LTQ1NWMxYmI2NjQ3Yy5wbmc_.IfxTFqc7bnQMUMaxcRNaM1KN8BZiRbtPxosfWMdiLXY)
  
- **Sessions**  
  지난 세션 주제를 기록하여 제공.  
  ![Image](https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/106393694/476114196-b6c7e95c-b5ae-4371-ae10-615cedd0ebae.png?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJnaXRodWIuY29tIiwiYXVkIjoicmF3LmdpdGh1YnVzZXJjb250ZW50LmNvbSIsImtleSI6ImtleTUiLCJleHAiOjE3NTQ2NzI1MjQsIm5iZiI6MTc1NDY3MjIyNCwicGF0aCI6Ii8xMDYzOTM2OTQvNDc2MTE0MTk2LWI2YzdlOTVjLWI1YWUtNDM3MS1hZTEwLTYxNWNlZGQwZWJhZS5wbmc_.JuVSIfktDdFb0RxMCzrI4o36riYxsMWR7-UjfZwEztE)
  
- **Members**  
  ACC DGU 운영진 및 멤버 소개, 역할과 관심 분야 안내.  
  ![Image](https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/106393694/476114352-4a13e7de-ad93-47b1-b36d-b64a17b5930e.png?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJnaXRodWIuY29tIiwiYXVkIjoicmF3LmdpdGh1YnVzZXJjb250ZW50LmNvbSIsImtleSI6ImtleTUiLCJleHAiOjE3NTQ2NzI1MjQsIm5iZiI6MTc1NDY3MjIyNCwicGF0aCI6Ii8xMDYzOTM2OTQvNDc2MTE0MzUyLTRhMTNlN2RlLWFkOTMtNDdiMS1iMzZkLWI2NGExN2I1OTMwZS5wbmc_.jpFykKL1_onPrpm9lBCcVc_cX6yXbUEgiF1OzvHwoiY)


---

## 🔧 Tech Stack

### 💻 Frontend
- **Next.js**
- **TypeScript**
- **Tailwind CSS**
- **Framer Motion**
- **Lucide Icons**
- **Pretter**

### ☁️ Infra
- **S3 (AWS)**
- **CloudFront (AWS)**

---

## 📜 Commit Convention

| Type         | Description |
|--------------|---|
| `feat`       | 신규 페이지 혹은 기능 추가 |
| `fix`        | 버그 수정 |
| `docs`       | 문서 혹은 코드 내 텍스트 수정 |
| `refactor`   | 코드 리팩토링 |
| `chore`      | 빌드 설정, 패키지 관리 등 기타 작업|

---

## 🚀 Getting Started

```bash
# 패키지 설치
npm install

# 개발 서버 실행
npm run dev
